title: SOLID
description: SOLID documents overview material for SOLID in the language domain. It is classified as a concept page, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Single Responsibility PrincipleSRP, Open-Closed PrincipleOCP, Liskov Substitution PrincipleLSP, Interface Segregation PrincipleISP, and Dependency Inversion PrincipleDIP, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include language, and concepts, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is language / concepts / solid, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation. Use it for quick orientation, implementation reminders, and deeper research.
